title: BOLSIUS Silhouette Pillar Candle 13cm x 6.8cm Soft Pearl Fern Christmas Dinner Table, Ivory, white
features: PACKAGE DETAILS - Available in a stunning festive fern print, each candle is sold individually.

BOTANICAL DESIGN - Bolsius's rustic candle Silhouette's colour Soft Pearl is a subtle ivory white tone inspired by the soft hue of pearls. With a botanical motif of fern leaves, this candle makes for an absolute eye-catcher in your interiors.

ECO FRIENDLY AND VEGAN - Inspired by textures and colour tones from nature and made with love for people and planet. Without palm oil and animal fat, but with natural, vegan wax from olive, sunflower or rapeseed oil. Let your home sparkle!
description: About Bolsius Pillar Candles This new rustic candle range from Bolsius is inspired by the colors and textures of nature. Free from palm oil or animal fat, they’re made with a plant based wax and a cotton wick. On top of that, these new renewed rustic candles now burns even longer. With a large flame and soft light, these Bolsius Rustic Pillar Candles bring atmosphere to any environment. Size: 13cm x 6.8cm Fragrance: Unscented
